flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Illinois Valley Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.9k → $16.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Illinois Valley Community College fell 13% between 2006 and 2009 (36.3% → 31.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Illinois Valley Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Illinois Valley Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9k → 2.0k).
